goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alexander bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'postcode', and 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should 'leave after 10:15'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alexander bed and breakfast
Make sure you get star of the hotel, postcode, and whether they have internet
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to london kings cross and should leave after 10:15
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and price
